public_reputation: Sacred timekeeper whose bells shape movement, observance, and funerary tempo across Panim spaces.
manner: Carries the habits of a bell-sister whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Panim Haven.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of bell-sister in and around Panim Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Panim Haven workable through the obligations of bell-sister while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of bell-sister credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Panim Haven.

adventure_hooks.summary: Bell-Sister Terenya can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Panim Haven.
Bell-Sister Terenya becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a bell-sister.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Bell-Sister Terenya is readable as a bell-sister tied to Panim Haven.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Panim Haven: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Bell-Sister Terenya presents as someone shaped by the duties of a bell-sister and the daily pressures of Panim Haven.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a bell-sister, and proof that strangers will not make Panim Haven harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Bell-Sister Terenya refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a bell-sister too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Bell-Sister Terenya can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Bell-Sister Terenya adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Bell-Sister Terenya always knows more about Panim Haven than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to bell-sister duties in Panim Haven.
